title: Nuclear Winter
description: Survive in a post-apocalyptic landscape with an overhauled, dying world of extreme hots and colds. Overcome your foes with a vast arsenal of weapons, and choose between either scavenging or evolving your technology to progress.
body:
![Unfoldtitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72eaec945eaa26930f19d8af3106feb0bdd8289a.png)

Nuclear Winter is a new take on the survival experience of Minecraft. While not focused on overt challenge, it is focused on overhauling combat, and exploration, and giving a necessarry level of thought that goes into both of these things.

![ghosttown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5efe73491cc073d11532f889573f2b88ab61ad54_0.webp)

Natural Regeneration? Gone. Brainless traversing of the world? Gone. Welcome to Nuclear Winter. Overcome these obstacles by manufacturing great weapons, and protective armors. Scavenge, manufacture, do what you must to advance in this world!

![winter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9585d2745140b74cda81c0b3ba2c7ab96c125f94.png)
